args.query: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name, p.Description FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name, p.Description FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'

result.preview: [{"OrderId": "801Wt00000PHRYWIA5", "EffectiveDate": "2021-06-15", "OrderItemId": "802Wt0000079AU1IAM", "Product2Id": "01tWt000006hV8LIAU", "Name": "AI Cirku-Tech", "Description": "AI-driven circuit design platform offering rapid prototyping and innovation support."}]

args.query: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name, p.Description FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01' AND (p.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Name LIKE '%processing%' OR p.Name LIKE '%unit%')

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name, p.Description FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01' AND (p.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Name LIKE '%processing%' OR p.Name LIKE '%unit%')
